Home.title: Reputation for your Telegram community
Home.subtitle: Add a bot, and we'll track who actually contributes — messages, replies, reactions — then build a public ranking and issue verifiable certificates to your top members.
Home.step1Body: Invite TeleRep to your group as an admin. It greets itself and begins tracking activity from that moment.
Home.step2Body: Every message, reply, and reaction earns score. Inactive members lose points after a 7-day grace period. Only metadata is stored — never message text.
Home.step3Body: A public leaderboard appears at /c/your-chat. Issue PDF certificates to top contributors with one click from your dashboard.

Chat.noActivity: No activity yet — once members start chatting, the leaderboard appears here.
Chat.notFoundBody: This community doesn't exist on TeleRep yet.

User.noCommunities: Not active in any tracked community yet.
User.notFoundBody: We have no record of this Telegram user.

Login.title: Sign in
Login.subtitle: Use Telegram to sign in and access community dashboards you administer.

Dashboard.noActivity: No messages yet in the last 30 days.
Dashboard.forbiddenBody: You must be an administrator of this Telegram chat to view its dashboard.

Verify.title: Certificate of Recognition
Verify.subtitle: Issued by TeleRep based on tracked community activity.
Verify.notFoundBody: No certificate exists with this ID. It may have been revoked, or the link is mistyped.
